nasb.text: Going on a little farther, He saw James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother, who were also in the boat mending the nets.

esv.text: And going on a little farther, he saw James the son of Zebedee and John his brother, who were in their boat mending the nets.

cnv.text: 耶穌稍往前走，看見西庇太的兒子雅各，和雅各的弟弟約翰，正在船上整理魚網，

ccb.text: 耶稣往前走了不远，又看见西庇太的两个儿子雅各和约翰正在船上补网，

csbs.text: 稍往前走，耶稣看见西庇太的儿子雅各和他弟弟约翰。他们正在船上修补渔网。
